title: Duplicate content hash on retry
description: A runner retries a poll and sees parts it already bridged. The duplicate content must be detected (by request ID dedup window or seq constraint), and no duplicate agent_events rows should be inserted.
production_scenario: The runner's poll loop re-fetches messages it already processed (e.g., due to a timeout or retry). The dedup mechanism must prevent inserting the same event twice while still allowing genuinely new events through.
